title: The Fable 5 Backlash Is Getting Serious
summary: Claude Fable 5 faces significant backlash over overly aggressive safety filters that refuse harmless prompts and trigger false alarms. Users question whether they are receiving the actual model or a downgraded fallback, raising concerns about trust in closed AI systems and the transparency of guardrails applied behind the scenes.
writeup: The video covers user backlash against Claude Fable 5 over safety filters that are described as overly aggressive, refusing harmless prompts and triggering false alarms. It matters because the complaints feed broader questions about trust in closed AI systems and the transparency of guardrails applied behind the scenes. A central concern is whether users receive the actual model or a downgraded fallback, with alignment and guardrail decisions made out of view.
